warps.note: South exit left tile — back to Outside
South exit right tile — back to Outside
Floor hole left — drops into Inner Chamber after puzzle solved
Floor hole right — drops into Inner Chamber after puzzle solved
North wall passage — opens after WATER word puzzle solved on north wall

tile_layout.notes: 4x5 block chamber (8x10 tiles). Identical layout to all four puzzle chambers. Puzzle panel at tiles (3,2)-(4,2). Floor holes at (3,3)-(4,3) after Omanyte puzzle completion. The entry scene calls special OmanyteChamber on entry.

signs.text: It's a replica of an ancient POKEMON.
It's a replica of an ancient POKEMON.
This POKEMON drifted in the sea by twisting its ten tentacles.
Patterns appeared on the walls… [Displays UNOWNWORDS_WATER — spells WATER in Unown script]
Patterns appeared on the walls… [Displays UNOWNWORDS_WATER]. After wall opens: 'There's a big hole in the wall!'

completion_effects: Sets ENGINE_UNLOCKED_UNOWNS_L_TO_R (unlocks Unown forms L through R)
Triggers earthquake and skyfall — player drops through floor to Inner Chamber
Floor blocks at (3,3) and (4,3) change to hole tiles ($18/$19)
puzzle.wall_word_effect: Opens north wall passage to Omanyte Item Room (block $2e becomes $30)

events.description: SCENE_RUINSOFALPHOMANYTECHAMBER_CHECK_WALL: calls special OmanyteChamber first, then checks EVENT_WALL_OPENED_IN_OMANYTE_CHAMBER. MAPCALLBACK_TILES restores closed floor unless puzzle already solved.
Completing the Omanyte puzzle triggers earthquake, shock emote, converts floor tiles to holes, skyfall — player falls into Inner Chamber at warps 6 and 7.

notes: The Omanyte Chamber is the south-west puzzle chamber, entered from RuinsOfAlphOutside warp at (2,29). Completing the Omanyte sliding tile puzzle unlocks Unown L through R. The north wall displays WATER in Unown script. The entry scene calls special OmanyteChamber (similar to HoOhChamber, may check for additional conditions). No NPCs present. The Omanyte word matches the water-dwelling nature of the fossil Pokemon depicted.
